Upload manga

A .zip/.tar/.tar.gz/.tar.xz/.7z/.rar of raw page images (one subfolder per volume, or images directly for a single volume), or a .pdf. Text-layer PDFs convert straight to EPUB with no OCR; scanned PDFs and archives are queued for GPU OCR. The resulting EPUBs appear in the library once done.
